acquisition method: involving targeted mass spectrometry and LFQ as described earlier with some modifications.
cleavage agent: digested with 2 μg of sequencing grade trypsin (Promega) overnight at 37 °C.
collision energy: low (4 eV) and high (20–40 eV ramp)
spectra were recorded from alternate scans at low (4 eV) and high (20–40 eV ramp) collision energies.
enrichment method: the biotinylated proteins were then isolated by streptavidin agarose affinity purification.
fractionation method: All the obtained fractions were then separated by 12% SDS-PAGE and analyzed with LC-MS/MS.
instrument: electrosprayed into a Q-Exactive mass spectrometer using a Nanospray Flex ion source.
ionization type: electrosprayed into a Q-Exactive mass spectrometer using a Nanospray Flex ion source.
labeling: the abundance values expressed in label-free quantification (LFQ) ranged from 35.8.
